data.title: NuVista Energy Ltd. and Ovintiv Inc. receive Investment Canada Act approval for acquisition; important numbers: TSX: NVA, NYSE, TSX: OVV.
data.description: Calgary, Alberta, January 28, 2026 - NuVista Energy Ltd. (TSX: NVA) and Ovintiv Inc. (NYSE, TSX: OVV) have received approval from the Government of Canada for the acquisition of NuVista by Ovintiv. The transaction will be carried out by Ovintiv's subsidiary, Ovintiv Canada ULC, under the Investment Canada Act.

data.title: Stock market saw Meta surge after earnings, Microsoft decline, and Tesla rise with Elon Musk's presence. Dow Jones Futures impacted heavily.
data.description: Major corporate giants, including Tesla, Microsoft, and Meta, reported substantial earnings following a temporary halt in the stock market surge to all-time highs. Meta notably surged after releasing its earnings, while Microsoft experienced a decline in its stock value. Meanwhile, Tesla saw a rise in its stock price as investors eagerly awaited updates from CEO Elon Musk. The overall market trend reflected a mix of successes and setbacks among these prominent companies as they navigated the demands of investors and financial performance expectations.

data.title: Nasdaq rises after Powell's optimistic outlook; Tesla surges. Dow Jones wavers as Fed maintains key rate. Tesla awaits earnings.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed instability as it fluctuated on Wednesday following the Federal Reserve's decision to maintain its key interest rate. Tesla is anticipating its earnings report later in the day. Meanwhile, the Nasdaq experienced a rise, reflecting positive sentiments as Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell expressed optimism about the economic outlook. Notably, Tesla's stock saw a significant surge. This information was highlighted in the live coverage provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: DAS Technology finalist in NADA Exhibitor Pitch Competition 2026; unveils AI Search Solution. Shows among 600 exhibitors.
data.description: DAS Technology, a top AI-native Customer Data & Experience Platform provider for automotive retailers, has been chosen as a finalist for the 2026 National Automobile Dealers Association (NADA) Exhibitor Pitch Competition. The event is scheduled to take place from February 3rd to 6th during the annual convention in Las Vegas, where there will be more than 600 exhibitors present. Among the competing products, DAS Technology is among the ten finalists contending for the title of "Best New Product in 2026." This recognition highlights the company's innovation and significance in the automotive industry.

data.title: DUB inhibitors market in 7MM set to expand by 2040 due to novel therapeutics, driven by rising cancer cases.
data.description: The market for DUB inhibitors is expected to experience consistent growth due to increasing focus on targeted protein degradation and innovative oncology treatments. The rising incidence of cancer and neurodegenerative diseases also contributes to the market's expansion. The launch of new products and technologies is anticipated to propel the market further.

data.title: OpenAI introduces free science platform Prism for scientific writing, amid concerns about privacy. Experts caution against potential risks.
data.description: Prism is looking to transition ChatGPT into the realm of scientific writing, as OpenAI indicates intentions to eventually distribute some of the earnings. However, caution is being advised by some individuals due to potential drawbacks of this decision.

data.title: Lundin Mining pre-announces Q4 impact on earnings and adjusted EBITDA; $83M from provisional pricing adjustments and $450M net positive impact expected from significant items. Fourth quarter results to be released on Feb 19, 2026, followed by conference call on Feb 20, 2026, with certain items excluded from adjusted figures.
data.description: Lundin Mining Corporation announces pre-announced items affecting earnings for the three months ending December 31, 2025. Revenue for the fourth quarter expected to rise by $83 million due to provisional pricing adjustments on past concentrate sales. They also anticipate $16 million in realized losses from commodity derivative contracts, with an $8 million unrealized gain related to derivative contracts valuation. Other items impacting earnings include a deferred tax recovery totaling $450 million but exclude from adjusted EBITDA. Earnings from discontinued operations may rise by $100 million. Full financial results to be released on February 19, 2026. Non-GAAP measures were used in this announcement.

data.title: Champion Iron posts Q3 results: 3.7M wmt prod, $472M revenue, $65M net income, $152M EBITDA, and progress on DRPF project.
data.description: Champion Iron Limited reported its financial results for the third quarter ended December 31, 2025. The company had a quarterly production of 3.7 million wmt and record sales of 3.9 million dmt, generating revenue of $472 million with a net income of $65 million and EBITDA of $152 million. They reduced iron ore concentrate inventories at Bloom Lake by 1.1 million wmt to 0.6 million wmt. The DRPF project is progressing towards its first shipment by the end of H1/2026. Additionally, Champion announced a cash tender offer to acquire Rana Gruber with financial support from La Caisse and Scotiabank. Their CEO highlighted initiatives to unlock stakeholder value and expected growth opportunities. There were no serious workplace injuries reported, and mining performance was strong. The company had strong available liquidity at $751.4 million as of December 31, 2025. Lastly, they discussed ongoing projects like the Kami Project's definitive feasibility study and securing commercial agreements for anticipated DR quality iron ore production.

data.title: Invictus Pharmacy expands with strategic acquisition, enhancing its national platform.
data.description: Invictus Pharmacy, under the management of Invictus Ventures Inc., recently disclosed a strategic acquisition and integration of further pharmacy operations. This move solidifies their position as a vertically integrated, nationwide licensed pharmacy platform. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026. The specifics of the acquisition, including the number of new pharmacy operations involved and the impact on patient services, were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Freedom Bank appoints Joe Daniel as SVP & Director of Sales & Marketing to accelerate growth. Joe will join Freedom Financial Holdings, Inc. as per PR Newswire on Jan. 28, 2026. (Numbers: OTCQX: FDVA)
data.description: Experienced Sales and Marketing professional, Joe Daniel, has joined Freedom Bank in Fairfax, Virginia, marking a strategic move to enhance the company's growth trajectory. On January 28, 2026, Freedom Financial Holdings, Inc. (OTCQX: FDVA) revealed Daniel's appointment as the new Senior Vice President and Director of Sales & Marketing. This decision underscores the bank's commitment to bolstering its sales and marketing functions in order to drive expansion.

data.title: C&S Group Enterprises LLC to hold conference call on Feb 3, 2026 at 11:00 am ET to review First-Quarter Fiscal 2026 results for period ended Dec 20, 2025 with a recording available until March 3, 2026.
data.description: C&S Group Enterprises LLC revealed plans for a teleconference on February 3, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. ET to delve into the Quarterly Report for the period concluding on December 20, 2025. The management will present the operating results, followed by a Q&A session. The conference call recording will be accessible until March 3, 2026, at midnight.

data.title: Board of Ball Corporation declared a 20-cent per share cash dividend, payable on March 16, 2026, to shareholders of record as of March 2, 2026.
data.description: In Westminster, Colorado on January 28, 2026, Ball Corporation (NYSE: BALL) announced a cash dividend of 20 cents per share. The dividend will be paid on March 16, 2026, to shareholders recorded as of March 2, 2026. In addition, Ball Corporation will disclose further details during an upcoming conference call.

data.title: Oil States signs new $125m credit agreement with $75m credit facility and $50m term loan, available till July 2026. Wells Fargo serves as administrative agent.
data.description: Oil States International, Inc. revealed a new credit agreement today in Houston. The "Cash Flow Credit Agreement" includes $125 million in total commitments. This consists of a $75 million revolving credit facility and a $50 million multi-draw term loan facility. The funds will be accessible for draw until July 28, 2026. Wells Fargo Bank, National Association is serving as the administrative agent for this agreement.

data.title: Assurant (NYSE: AIZ) appoints Lynn Blake to Board of Directors, effective Jan 28, 2026. Former State Street Investment Management EVP joins.
data.description: Assurant, Inc., a renowned global protection company, has appointed Lynn Blake, former Executive VP and Chief Investment Officer at State Street Investment Management, to its Board of Directors. Effective January 28, 2026, Blake will join the board, bringing her expertise in Global Equity Beta Solutions. Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ) specializes in safeguarding and servicing connected devices, homes, and automobiles in collaboration with top brands worldwide. This strategic addition enhances the company's finance and risk oversight.

data.title: StoneX Group Inc. will announce 2026 Q1 earnings on Feb 4, with a conference call on Feb 5 at 9am ET.
data.description: A conference call is scheduled to take place on February 5, 2026, at 9:00 am Eastern Time.

data.title: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. to start trading Class A Ordinary Shares and Warrants separately from Feb. 2, 2026; 17.25M units in IPO.
data.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. disclosed that participants in the initial public offering recently held comprised a total of 17,250,000 units, with 2,250,000 units from the underwriters' exercise. The company, listed as Nasdaq: BLRKU, made the announcement on Jan. 28, 2026.

data.title: PenFed Credit Union's earnings, capital, and liquidity grew in 2025 with $2.9 billion net worth.
data.description: PenFed Credit Union, a prominent federal credit union in the United States, holds a net worth exceeding $2.9 billion. Based in TYSONS, Va., as of January 28, 2026, the credit union highlighted its strong financial position, solid earnings growth, and ample liquidity.
